query:
SELECT ws.id, ws.workflow_id, ws.step_order, ws.subject, ws.delay_days FROM workflow_steps ws WHERE ws.subject LIKE '%terms%' OR ws.subject LIKE '%Terms%' LIMIT 20;
SELECT des.id, des.step_name, des.subject FROM drip_email_steps des WHERE des.subject LIKE '%terms%' OR des.subject LIKE '%Terms%' LIMIT 20;
